name: PyChem-Pro
desc: PyChem-Pro: a flexible programmable, fast molecular viewer - 2D and 3D, molecular docking pose viewer, cheminformatics library, molecular descriptor calculator…
descFull: PyChem-Pro: a flexible programmable, fast molecular viewer - 2D and 3D, molecular docking pose viewer, cheminformatics library, molecular descriptor calculator, molecular editor, chemical drawing editor, QSAR model developer, and many more...
